Advanced ServeMux patterns validate and generate: specificity overlap,
rest-of-path wildcards, exact match, wildcard group prefixes.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http GET /users/new
func New(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http GET /users/{id}
func Show(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http GET /files/{path...}
func Files(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http GET /{$}
func Root(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http PURGE /cache
func Purge(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}

//fabrik:http:group /tenants/{tid}
type Tenant struct{}

//fabrik:http GET /info
func (t *Tenant) Info(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/router"

	"app/web"
)

func run() error {
	// Providers
	r := router.New()
	webTenant := &web.Tenant{}

	// Routes
	r.Method("GET", "/users/new", web.New)
	r.Method("GET", "/users/{id}", web.Show)
	r.Method("GET", "/files/{path...}", web.Files)
	r.Method("GET", "/{$}", web.Root)
	r.Method("PURGE", "/cache", web.Purge)
	r.Method("GET", "/tenants/{tid}/info", webTenant.Info)

	// Serve
	addr := ":8080"
	if p := os.Getenv("PORT"); p != "" {
		addr = ":" + p
	}
	return http.ListenAndServe(addr, r)
}
